scope.summary: Prove backend startup restore failure marks only the affected cloud account as reauth-needed, matching the SaaS test-plan expectation for expired/invalid Zalo credentials.
goals: Expose a migrate-only server mode for deterministic dev smoke setup
Seed one active account with invalid encrypted credential material before server startup
On restore failure, update cloud_accounts.state to reauth-needed and hosted_sessions.last_error without failing server startup
Keep normal magic-link, device, file, revoke, and fake-account send smoke paths passing
nonGoals: Claiming hosted QR/listen/send restart restore without a real account

acceptance.description: Postgres-backed smoke seeds one broken active account before startup; server restore marks it reauth-needed and the rest of the smoke still passes.

verification.manual: Attach attested server/scripts/run-dev-smoke.sh output containing reauthRestoreMarked=true.
